prestazioni: Engine swap to a 2GR-FKS (3.5L V6, 310hp stock) with a Magnuson TVS2300 supercharger (12psi boost, 450whp target) paired with a Koyoritsu Racing 6-speed manual transmission conversion (R154 casing, custom bellhousing, and Toyota Supra JZ-series clutch)

Full custom turbo kit using a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) on a 2TZ-FZE (2.4L turbocharged inline-4, stock engine code) with a Tomei 272° camshaft upgrade, HKS Hi-Power exhaust manifold, and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for 18psi peak boost

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valving for Previa’s 5-link rear suspension), Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear), and Cusco front strut tower bar (reinforced for the Previa’s unique mid-engine layout)
estetica: Veilside Fortune 03 widebody kit (modified to fit Previa’s sliding rear doors) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, paired with a Rocket Bunny Previa-specific rear diffuser and custom aluminum side skirts

Full custom front bumper with integrated DRLs (Osram LEDriving Fog PLUS) and a Seibon carbon fiber hood (heat extractor vents for the 2TZ-FZE turbo setup), finished in a 3-stage matte PPG Toyota Super White II paint with House of Kolor Kandy Apple Red accents
Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9.5 +25 front, 18x10.5 +30 rear) wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear), with custom rear-wheel spacers (20mm) to fill the widebody arches
